title: Automations from sub items
excerpt:
I am trying to create an automation so that when the subitems all are marked as done the status of the item goes to being completed. 
I’ve tried several now but nothing is automatically updating it.

posts.author: graceds (grace delaney-segar)

Welcome to the community. When you add an automation to your board and type subitems in the search bar, the second one that shows is:
